title: Sunscreen for the planet, Out Loud
subtitle: The world is warming faster than we can cut emissions. Volcanoes are already cooling the planet, with particles that reflect sunlight. Maybe we can too.
byline: Works in Progress, Daniele Visioni, Dakota Gruener
contentHtml:
Sunscreen for the planet, Out Loud

You can listen to Sunscreen for the planet here or on Apple, Spotify, YouTube, or wherever you find your podcasts.

You can see the images, graphs and read the article on our website.

Words by Daniele Visioni & Dakota Gruener
Read by Stuart Ritchie
Music by David Hackett
